roles.name: Augur of the Capitoline
roles.description: Reads the auspices of system design — interprets omens of architecture and consecrates the master plan.

roles.name: Praetor of the Cohort
roles.description: Marshals the legion of delivery, holds the cursus honorum of the timeline, and reports to the Senate.

roles.name: Aedile of the Records
roles.description: Custodian of public works, fields, layouts, and permission sets — keeps the temple in order.

roles.name: Vulcan's Smith
roles.description: Forges Apex and LWC at the anvil of Mount Etna — hammers raw requirements into platform craft.

roles.name: Consul of the West
roles.description: Highest magistrate of the Salesforce craft — sets the laws of the practice and presides over the senior smiths.

roles.name: Centurion of the Eastern Legion
roles.description: Commands a hundred — leads delivery of complex builds with the discipline of the legions.

roles.name: Legionary of the Eastern Cohort
roles.description: Marches in formation under the Centurion — carries configuration and discovery across the provinces.

roles.name: Pontifex of the Bridges
roles.description: Builder of the great bridges — architect of the spans between Salesforce and the realms beyond.

roles.name: Bridge-Builder of the Tiber
roles.description: Lays the stones of API, middleware, and event flows under the Pontifex's design.

roles.name: Apprentice Mason of the Aqueduct
roles.description: Learns the craft of channels and conduits — webhooks, batch, callouts and the patterns of Roman engineering.

roles.name: Haruspex of the Build
roles.description: Reads the entrails of the test run — divines defects from the omens before the build reaches the Forum.

roles.name: Herald of the Forum
roles.description: Lifts the standard and the cornu for the message — leads all marketing craft from the Rostra.

roles.name: Orator of the Rostra
roles.description: Strategist of campaigns — sounds the call from the speaker's platform to gather and convert.

roles.name: Crier of the Provinces
roles.description: Carries the campaign forward into the field — content, creative, and the daily ride of the cursus publicus.

roles.name: Scribe of the Senate
roles.description: Records what the Senate decrees — translates between the Patrician customer and the artisans of the build.

roles.name: Master Smith of the Forum
roles.description: Most senior of the Vulcan's smiths in the West — designs the deepest Apex and platform architectures.

roles.name: Tiro of the Eastern Cohort
roles.description: Newly enlisted — apprentice in the legion learning configuration, flows, and the discipline of delivery.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every realm starts at least one month in the past — past weeks get Time Entries (Step 6), future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items (each with 2 child sub-scopes) — the wizard inserts parents first, then children with Parent_WorkStream__c set.

realms.projectName: State & Household Gods — Civic Hearth Platform
Heroes of Rome — Republic Loyalty CRM

workstreams.name: Build the Walls of the City
Trials at the Gates of Dis

dii-consentes.name: Council Convened on Olympus
dii-consentes.description: Discovery sign-off — the twelve seats are filled and the auspices read.

dii-consentes.name: Forging the Thunderbolts
dii-consentes.description: Build kickoff: Vulcan's forge lit beneath Etna.

dii-consentes.name: Audience with Jupiter
dii-consentes.description: Mid-project gate: solution review with the Father of Gods.

dii-consentes.name: Triumph at the Capitoline
dii-consentes.description: Phase invoice trigger: triumphal procession up the Capitoline Hill.

dii-consentes.name: Consecration of the Temple
dii-consentes.description: Go-Live: the Temple of Jupiter Optimus Maximus consecrated.

dii-consentes.name: Pax Deorum Hand-off
dii-consentes.description: Hyper-care close: peace with the gods restored, stewardship handed to the priests.

state-and-household-gods.name: Lighting the Eternal Flame
state-and-household-gods.description: Project kickoff: the Vestal flame relit in the Forum.

state-and-household-gods.name: Opening the Gates of Janus
state-and-household-gods.description: Build phase: the doors of the Janus shrine thrown open.

state-and-household-gods.name: Saturnalia Pause
state-and-household-gods.description: UAT gate: the world reverses, masters serve slaves, all is reviewed.

state-and-household-gods.name: Dedication of the Lararium
state-and-household-gods.description: Go-Live: the household shrine is dedicated and the Penates installed.

state-and-household-gods.name: Closing the Gates of Janus
state-and-household-gods.description: Hyper-care close: peace declared, the Janus gates are shut.

state-and-household-gods.name: Tribute to the Genius
state-and-household-gods.description: Final invoice: offerings to the Genius of the household.

heroes-of-rome.name: Founding the City
heroes-of-rome.description: Discovery: Romulus traces the pomerium with the sacred plough.

heroes-of-rome.name: Holding the Pons Sublicius
heroes-of-rome.description: Build: Horatius and his two companions stand against the Etruscan host.

heroes-of-rome.name: Mucius's Hand in the Fire
heroes-of-rome.description: Solution review: Mucius Scaevola proves Roman resolve before Porsenna.

heroes-of-rome.name: Cincinnatus Returns to the Plough
heroes-of-rome.description: Go-Live: the dictator lays down power and returns to the farm.

heroes-of-rome.name: Triumph in the Forum
heroes-of-rome.description: Project close: the laurel wreath bestowed in the Forum Romanum.

heroes-of-rome.name: Senate's Final Decree
heroes-of-rome.description: Final invoice ratified by senatus consultum.

underworld-and-fates.name: Crossing the Styx
underworld-and-fates.description: Kickoff: Charon ferries the project across the river of oaths.

underworld-and-fates.name: Spinning the Thread
underworld-and-fates.description: Discovery: Nona spins the thread of the project's life.

underworld-and-fates.name: Measuring the Thread
underworld-and-fates.description: Build: Decima measures the length of each release.

underworld-and-fates.name: Judgement at the Throne of Pluto
underworld-and-fates.description: UAT acceptance: Pluto and Proserpina pass sentence on the build.

underworld-and-fates.name: Cutting the Thread
underworld-and-fates.description: Go-Live + handoff: Morta cuts the thread and the project is completed.

underworld-and-fates.name: Coin for the Ferryman
underworld-and-fates.description: Final invoice: the obol placed beneath the tongue, paid to Charon.

Vulcan.notes: Vulcanalia — annual forge cleansing at Etna.

Janus.notes: New Year doorway rites — both faces in use.

Saturn.notes: Saturnalia — entire team observes, world inverts.

Faunus.notes: Lupercalia preparations in the Lupercal cave.

Romulus.notes: Quirinalia — observed by all founders of the city.

Cincinnatus.notes: Returned to the farm — ploughing the south field.

Horatius Cocles.notes: Bridge wound recovery — leg still smarts from the swim.

Proserpina.notes: Six months above ground with Ceres — contractually obligated.

Alecto.notes: Whip re-braiding day — vengeance temporarily paused.
